text: This is Officer Sharma from the Cyber Cell. Your SIM card has been linked to a fraudulent transaction; we need you to verify your identity on a secure video call.
Our team has been tracking a tax evasion case, and your name has come up in the investigation. We need to discuss this further on a video call.
We have reason to believe your bank account has been used for money laundering. Please join a secure video call to verify your account details and avoid account freezing.
Our department has received a report of your involvement in a cryptocurrency scam. We request your presence on a video conference to investigate this matter further.
A case of identity theft has been registered against you at our police station. We need to verify your identity through a video call to proceed with the investigation.

The Central Bureau of Investigation is investigating a case of online fraud, and your name has surfaced during the investigation. We need you to join a video call to provide your statement and cooperate with the investigation.
